goal: Update all 248 companion files that still reference aether-utils.sh and shell scripts to reference the Go binary instead. Update the source-of-truth map, architecture docs, and command definitions to accurately describe the v5.0 Go-based system. Aether migrated from shell to Go but the distributed documentation still describes the dead shell architecture — this is the root cause of recurring infrastructure gaps.

phases.description: Update 3 YAML source files and command template. lay-eggs.yaml (8 refs -> aether setup), init.yaml (1 ref), resume.yaml (1 ref), template.yaml (1 ref).
phases.name: YAML source definitions

constraints: aether setup replaces hub sync, mkdir, chmod, .gitignore generation

phases.description: Batch-update 42 .aether/commands/claude/ files and 45 .aether/commands/opencode/ files. Apply sed: bash .aether/aether-utils.sh -> aether.
phases.name: Claude + OpenCode command files (92 files)

phases.description: Update .claude/commands/ant/ (3 files: init.md, lay-eggs.md, resume.md) and .opencode/commands/ant/ (45 files). Runtime slash commands loaded by editors.
phases.name: Claude Code + OpenCode runtime commands (48 files)

phases.description: Update .aether/agents/ (20), .claude/agents/ant/ (6), .opencode/agents/ (20). Replace do not modify aether-utils.sh directives with Go source references.
phases.name: Agent definitions (46 files)

phases.description: Update .aether/docs/ (14), exchange XML (2), workers.md, QUEEN.md, CLAUDE.md, CHANGELOG.md, repo-structure.md, RUNTIME UPDATE ARCHITECTURE.md, TO-DOS.md, PROMPT-GO-CONVERSION.md, OPENCODE.md, docs/plans (7), Go source comments (2).
phases.name: Documentation and source files (29 files)

constraints: ci-context-assembly-design.md and state-contract-design.md need attribution table updates

tasks.goal: Update workers.md, QUEEN.md, CLAUDE.md, architecture docs, exchange XML
success_criteria: grep -c aether-utils.sh returns 0 for each file

tasks.goal: Update Go source comments in cmd/generate_cmds.go and pkg/storage/storage.go
success_criteria: grep -c aether-utils.sh returns 0 for both files

phases.description: Update weekly-audit.sh, add deprecation headers to 38 dead .aether/utils/ scripts, run final grep verification and Go test suite.
phases.name: Shell deprecation and final verification

constraints: spawn-efficiency and entropy-score subcommands confirmed in Go binary
Do not modify file contents, only prepend header
tasks.goal: Add DEPRECATED header to all 38 .aether/utils/ shell scripts
success_criteria: All 38 files have deprecation comment block

tasks.goal: Final grep verification across entire repo
success_criteria: Zero aether-utils.sh references in active scope

learnings.claim: Batch sed replacement across 87+ markdown files is faster and more reliable than per-file agent spawns for pure find-replace work
learnings.evidence: 478 references replaced across 87 files in parallel by 2 builders, verified by independent watcher with 0 issues

learnings.claim: Agent definition files across .aether/agents/, .claude/agents/ant/, and .opencode/agents/ contain both bash invocations and prose references to aether-utils.sh — both patterns need contextual replacement, not just sed
learnings.evidence: 47+47+8=102 references across 46 files; bash invocations replaced with aether CLI, prose references updated to reference Go source in cmd/ or pkg/
